data.name: IDS_TUTORIAL_TASK_HOPPER_REDSTONE
data.value: However if a Hopper is powered by Redstone it will become inactive and stop both sucking and inserting items.

data.name: IDS_TUTORIAL_TASK_HOPPER_OUTPUT
data.value: A Hopper points in the direction it tries to output items. To make a Hopper point to a particular block, place the Hopper against that block whilst sneaking.

data.name: IDS_TUTORIAL_TASK_HOPPER_AREA
data.value: There are various useful Hopper layouts for you to see and experiment with in this room.

data.name: IDS_TUTORIAL_TASK_FIREWORK_MENU_OVERVIEW
data.value: This is the Firework interface, which you can use to craft Fireworks and Firework Stars.

data.name: IDS_TUTORIAL_PROMPT_FIREWORK_MENU_OVERVIEW
IDS_TUTORIAL_TASK_FIREWORK_MENU_BASIC_START
data.value: To craft a Firework, place Gunpowder and Paper in the 3x3 crafting grid that is shown above your inventory.

data.name: IDS_TUTORIAL_TASK_FIREWORK_MENU_BASIC_STARS
data.value: You can optionally place multiple Firework Stars in the crafting grid to add them to the Firework.

data.name: IDS_TUTORIAL_TASK_FIREWORK_MENU_BASIC_HEIGHT
data.value: Filling more slots in the crafting grid with Gunpowder will increase the height at which all the Firework Stars will explode.

data.name: IDS_TUTORIAL_TASK_FIREWORK_MENU_BASIC_CRAFT
data.value: You can then take the crafted Firework out of the output slot when you wish to craft it.

data.name: IDS_TUTORIAL_TASK_FIREWORK_MENU_ADV_START
data.value: Firework Stars can be crafted by placing Gunpowder and Dye into the crafting grid.

data.name: IDS_TUTORIAL_TASK_FIREWORK_MENU_ADV_COLOUR
data.value: The Dye will set the color of the explosion of the Firework Star.

data.name: IDS_TUTORIAL_TASK_FIREWORK_MENU_ADV_SHAPE
data.value: The shape of the Firework Star is set by adding either a Fire Charge, Gold Nugget, Feather or Mob Head.

data.name: IDS_TUTORIAL_TASK_FIREWORK_MENU_ADV_EFFECT
data.value: A trail or a twinkle can be added using Diamonds or Glowstone Dust.

data.name: IDS_TUTORIAL_TASK_FIREWORK_MENU_ADV_FADE
data.value: After a Firework Star has been crafted, you can set the fade color of the Firework Star by crafting it with Dye.

data.name: IDS_TUTORIAL_TASK_FIREWORK_OVERVIEW
data.value: Contained within the chests here there are various items used in the creation of FIREWORKS!

data.name: IDS_TUTORIAL_PROMPT_FIREWORK_OVERVIEW
IDS_TUTORIAL_TASK_FIREWORK_PURPOSE
data.value: Fireworks are decorative items that can be launched by hand or from Dispensers. They are crafted using Paper, Gunpowder and optionally a number of Firework Stars.

data.name: IDS_TUTORIAL_TASK_FIREWORK_CUSTOMISE
data.value: The colors, fade, shape, size, and effects (such as trails and twinkles) of Firework Stars can be customized by including additional ingredients when crafting.

data.name: IDS_TUTORIAL_TASK_FIREWORK_CRAFTING
data.value: Try crafting a Firework at the Crafting Table using an assortment of ingredients from the chests.

data.name: IDS_CONFIRM_LEAVE_VIA_INVITE
data.value: Are you sure you want to leave your current game and join the new one? Any unsaved progress will be lost.

data.name: IDS_CONFIRM_SAVE_GAME
data.value: Are you sure you want to overwrite any previous save for this world with the current version of this world?

data.name: IDS_CONFIRM_DECLINE_SAVE_GAME
data.value: Are you sure you want to exit without saving? You will lose all progress in this world!

data.name: IDS_CORRUPT_OR_DAMAGED_SAVE_TEXT
data.value: This save is corrupt or damaged. Would you like to delete it?

data.name: IDS_CONFIRM_EXIT_GAME_CONFIRM_DISCONNECT_SAVE
data.value: Are you sure you want to exit to the main menu and disconnect all players from the game? Any unsaved progress will be lost.

data.name: IDS_CONFIRM_EXIT_GAME
data.value: Are you sure you want to exit to the main menu? Any unsaved progress will be lost.

data.name: IDS_CONFIRM_EXIT_GAME_PROGRESS_LOST
data.value: Are you sure you want to exit to the main menu? Your progress will be lost!

data.name: IDS_NAME_WORLD_TEXT
data.value: Enter a name for your world

data.name: IDS_CREATE_NEW_WORLD_SEEDTEXT
data.value: Input the seed for your world generation

data.name: IDS_GENERIC_ERROR
data.value: An error occurred. Exiting to the main menu.

data.name: IDS_CONNECTION_LOST_SERVER
data.value: Connection to the server was lost. Exiting to the main menu.

data.name: IDS_DISCONNECTED_KICKED
data.value: You were kicked from the game

data.name: IDS_DISCONNECTED_FLYING
data.value: You were kicked from the game for flying

data.name: IDS_DISCONNECTED_SERVER_QUIT
data.value: The host has exited the game.

data.name: IDS_DISCONNECTED_NO_FRIENDS_IN_GAME
data.value: You cannot join this game as you are not friends with anybody in the game.

data.name: IDS_DISCONNECTED_BANNED
data.value: You cannot join this game as you have previously been kicked by the host.

data.name: IDS_DISCONNECTED_SERVER_OLD
data.value: You cannot join this game as the player you are trying to join is running an older version of the game.

data.name: IDS_DISCONNECTED_CLIENT_OLD
data.value: You cannot join this game as the player you are trying to join is running a newer version of the game.

data.name: IDS_AWARD_GAMERPIC1
data.value: Hurray - you've been awarded a gamerpic featuring Steve from Minecraft!

data.name: IDS_AWARD_GAMERPIC2
data.value: Hurray - you've been awarded a gamerpic featuring a Creeper!

data.name: IDS_UNLOCK_TOSAVE_TEXT
data.value: You're playing the trial game, but you'll need the full game to be able to save your game. Would you like to unlock the full game now?

data.name: IDS_PROGRESS_HOST_SAVING
data.value: Please wait while the host saves the game

data.name: IDS_PROGRESS_NEW_WORLD_SEED
data.value: Finding Seed for the World Generator

data.name: IDS_TILE_BED_NO_SLEEP
data.value: You can only sleep at night

data.name: IDS_TILE_BED_PLAYERSLEEP
data.value: %s is sleeping in a bed. To skip to dawn, all players need to sleep in beds at the same time.

data.name: IDS_TILE_BED_NOT_VALID
data.value: Your home bed was missing or obstructed

data.name: IDS_TILE_BED_NOTSAFE
data.value: You may not rest now, there are monsters nearby

data.name: IDS_TILE_BED_MESLEEP
data.value: You are sleeping in a bed. To skip to dawn, all players need to sleep in beds at the same time.

data.name: IDS_DIFFICULTY_PEACEFUL
data.value: In this mode, the player regains health over time, and there are no enemies in the environment.

data.name: IDS_DIFFICULTY_EASY
data.value: In this mode, enemies spawn in the environment, but will do less damage to the player than in the Normal mode.

data.name: IDS_DIFFICULTY_NORMAL
data.value: In this mode, enemies spawn in the environment and will do a standard amount of damage to the player.

data.name: IDS_DIFFICULTY_HARD
data.value: In this mode, enemies will spawn in the environment, and will do a great deal of damage to the player. Watch out for the Creepers too, since they are unlikely to cancel their exploding attack when you move away from them!

data.name: IDS_MULTIPLAYER_FULL_TEXT
data.value: Failed to join game as there are no spaces left

data.name: IDS_SIGN_TITLE_TEXT
data.value: Enter a line of text for your sign

data.name: IDS_NAME_TITLE_TEXT
data.value: Enter a title for your post

data.name: IDS_NAME_CAPTION_TEXT
data.value: Enter a caption for your post

data.name: IDS_NAME_DESC_TEXT
data.value: Enter a description for your post

data.name: IDS_NO_DLCOFFERS
data.value: There are no downloadable content offers of this type available for this title at the moment.

data.name: IDS_TEXT_DELETE_SAVE
data.value: Are you sure you want to delete this save game?

data.name: IDS_DEFAULTS_TEXT
data.value: Are you sure you would like to reset your settings to their default values?

data.name: IDS_GUEST_ORDER_CHANGED_TEXT
data.value: A guest player has signed out causing all guest players to be removed from the game.

data.name: IDS_MUST_SIGN_IN_TEXT
data.value: You are not signed in. In order to play this game, you will need to be signed in. Do you want to sign in now?

data.name: IDS_PLAYER_BANNED_LEVEL
data.value: The game you are joining is in your banned level list. If you choose to join this game, the level will be removed from your banned level list.

data.name: IDS_ACTION_BAN_LEVEL_DESCRIPTION
data.value: Are you sure you want to add this level to your banned level list? Selecting OK will also exit this game.

data.name: IDS_CANT_PLACE_NEAR_SPAWN_TEXT
data.value: Placing lava close to the level spawn point is not allowed due to the possibility of instant death for spawning players.

data.name: IDS_UNLOCK_DLC_SKIN
data.value: To use the skin you have selected, you need to unlock this skin pack. Would you like to unlock this skin pack now?

data.name: IDS_UNLOCK_DLC_TEXTUREPACK_TEXT
data.value: To use this texture pack for your world, you need to unlock it. Would you like to unlock it now?

data.name: IDS_WARNING_DLC_TRIALTEXTUREPACK_TEXT
data.value: You are using a trial version of the texture pack. You will not be able to save this world unless you unlock the full version. Would you like to unlock the full version of the texture pack?

data.name: IDS_DLC_TEXTUREPACK_NOT_PRESENT
data.value: This world uses a mash-up pack or texture pack you don't have! Would you like to install the mash-up pack or texture pack now?

data.name: IDS_UNLOCK_KICK_PLAYER
data.value: Are you sure you want to kick this player from the game? They will not be able to rejoin until you restart the world.

data.name: IDS_NOTALLOWED_FRIENDSOFFRIENDS
data.value: You cannot join this game because it has been limited to players who are friends of the host.

data.name: IDS_CORRUPT_DLC
data.value: This downloadable content is corrupt and cannot be used. You need to delete it, then re-install it from the Minecraft Store menu.

data.name: IDS_CORRUPT_DLC_MULTIPLE
data.value: Some of your downloadable content is corrupt and cannot be used. You need to delete them, then re-install them from the Minecraft Store menu.

data.name: IDS_GAME_MODE_CHANGED
data.value: Your game mode has been changed

data.name: IDS_RENAME_WORLD_TEXT
data.value: Enter the new name for your world

data.name: IDS_TEXT_SAVEOPTIONS
data.value: What would you like to do with this save game?

data.name: IDS_GAMEOPTION_SEED
data.value: Enter a seed to generate the same terrain again. Leave blank for a random world.

data.name: IDS_GAMEOPTION_ONLINE
data.value: When enabled, the game will be an online game.

data.name: IDS_GAMEOPTION_INVITEONLY
data.value: When enabled, only invited players can join.

data.name: IDS_GAMEOPTION_ALLOWFOF
data.value: When enabled, friends of people on your Friends List can join the game.

data.name: IDS_GAMEOPTION_PVP
data.value: When enabled, players can inflict damage on other players. Only affects Survival mode.

data.name: IDS_GAMEOPTION_TRUST
data.value: When disabled, players joining the game cannot build or mine until authorised.

data.name: IDS_GAMEOPTION_FIRE_SPREADS
data.value: When enabled, fire may spread to nearby flammable blocks.

data.name: IDS_GAMEOPTION_TNT_EXPLODES
data.value: When enabled, TNT will explode when activated.

data.name: IDS_GAMEOPTION_RESET_NETHER
data.value: When enabled, the Nether world will be re-generated. This is useful if you have an older save where Nether Fortresses were not present.

data.name: IDS_GAMEOPTION_STRUCTURES
data.value: When enabled, structures such as Villages and Strongholds will generate in the world.

data.name: IDS_GAMEOPTION_SUPERFLAT
data.value: When enabled, a completely flat world will be generated in the Overworld and in the Nether.

data.name: IDS_GAMEOPTION_BONUS_CHEST
data.value: When enabled, a chest containing some useful items will be created near the player spawn point.

data.name: IDS_GAMEOPTION_MOB_GRIEFING
data.value: When disabled, prevents monsters and animals from changing blocks (for example, Creeper explosions won't destroy blocks and Sheep won't remove Grass) or picking up items.

data.name: IDS_GAMEOPTION_KEEP_INVENTORY
data.value: When enabled, players will keep their inventory when they die.

data.name: IDS_GAMEOPTION_MOB_SPAWNING
data.value: When disabled, mobs will not spawn naturally.

data.name: IDS_GAMEOPTION_MOB_LOOT
data.value: When disabled, monsters and animals will not drop loot (for example, Creepers won't drop gunpowder).

data.name: IDS_GAMEOPTION_TILE_DROPS
data.value: When disabled, blocks will not drop items when destroyed (for example, Stone blocks won't drop Cobblestone).

data.name: IDS_GAMEOPTION_NATURAL_REGEN
data.value: When disabled, players will not regenerate health naturally.

data.name: IDS_GAMEOPTION_DAYLIGHT_CYCLE
data.value: When disabled, the time of day will not change.

data.name: IDS_DEATH_DRAGON_BREATH
data.value: {*PLAYER*} was killed by Ender Dragon breath

data.name: IDS_DEATH_FELL_ASSIST_ITEM
data.value: {*PLAYER*} was doomed to fall by {*SOURCE*} using {*ITEM*}

data.name: IDS_DEATH_FELL_FINISH
data.value: {*PLAYER*} fell too far and was finished by {*SOURCE*}

data.name: IDS_DEATH_FELL_FINISH_ITEM
data.value: {*PLAYER*} fell too far and was finished by {*SOURCE*} using {*ITEM*}

data.name: IDS_DEATH_ONFIRE_PLAYER
data.value: {*PLAYER*} was burnt to a crisp whilst fighting {*SOURCE*}

data.name: IDS_DEATH_LAVA_PLAYER
data.value: {*PLAYER*} tried to swim in lava to escape {*SOURCE*}

data.name: IDS_DEATH_CACTUS_PLAYER
data.value: {*PLAYER*} walked into a cactus whilst trying to escape {*SOURCE*}

data.name: IDS_PRIV_MINE_TOGGLE_ON
data.value: You can no longer mine or use items

data.name: IDS_PRIV_MINE_TOGGLE_OFF
data.value: You can now mine and use items

data.name: IDS_PRIV_BUILD_TOGGLE_ON
data.value: You can no longer place blocks

data.name: IDS_PRIV_USE_DOORS_TOGGLE_ON
data.value: You can now use doors and switches

data.name: IDS_PRIV_USE_DOORS_TOGGLE_OFF
data.value: You can no longer use doors and switches

data.name: IDS_PRIV_USE_CONTAINERS_TOGGLE_ON
data.value: You can now use containers (e.g. chests)

data.name: IDS_PRIV_USE_CONTAINERS_TOGGLE_OFF
data.value: You can no longer use containers (e.g. chests)

data.name: IDS_PRIV_ATTACK_MOB_TOGGLE_ON
data.value: You can no longer attack mobs

data.name: IDS_PRIV_ATTACK_PLAYER_TOGGLE_ON
data.value: You can no longer attack players

data.name: IDS_PRIV_ATTACK_ANIMAL_TOGGLE_ON
data.value: You can no longer attack animals

data.name: IDS_PRIV_MODERATOR_TOGGLE_OFF
data.value: You are no longer a moderator

data.name: IDS_PRIV_EXHAUSTION_TOGGLE_ON
data.value: You will no longer get exhausted

data.name: IDS_SOCIAL_TEXT

data.name: IDS_DEFAULT_TEXTUREPACK
data.value: The classic Minecraft textures, icons and user interface!

data.name: IDS_POTION_DESC_WATER_BOTTLE
data.value: Used as the base of all potions. Use in a brewing stand to create potions.

data.name: IDS_POTION_DESC_EMPTY
data.value: Has no effects, can be used in a brewing stand to create potions by adding more ingredients.

data.name: IDS_POTION_DESC_MOVESPEED
data.value: Increases affected players, animals and monsters movement speed, and players sprinting speed, jumping length and field of view.

data.name: IDS_POTION_DESC_MOVESLOWDOWN
data.value: Reduces affected players, animals and monsters movement speed, and players sprinting speed, jumping length and field of view.

data.name: IDS_POTION_DESC_DAMAGEBOOST
data.value: Increase the damage caused by affected players and monsters when attacking.

data.name: IDS_POTION_DESC_WEAKNESS
data.value: Reduces the damage cause by affected players and monsters when attacking.

data.name: IDS_POTION_DESC_HEAL
data.value: Instantly increases the affected players, animals and monsters health.

data.name: IDS_POTION_DESC_HARM
data.value: Instantly reduces the affected players, animals and monsters health.

data.name: IDS_POTION_DESC_REGENERATION
data.value: Restores health to the affected players, animals and monsters over time.

data.name: IDS_POTION_DESC_FIRERESISTANCE
data.value: Makes the affected players, animals and monsters immune to damage from fire, lava, and ranged Blaze attacks.

data.name: IDS_POTION_DESC_POISON
data.value: Reduces health of the affected players, animals and monsters over time.

data.name: IDS_DESC_EMERALDORE
data.value: Can be mined with an Iron pickaxe or better to collect Emeralds.

data.name: IDS_DESC_ENDERCHEST
data.value: Similar to a Chest except that items placed in an Ender Chest are available in every one of the player's Ender Chests, even in different dimensions.

data.name: IDS_DESC_TRIPWIRE_SOURCE
data.value: Is activated when an entity passes through a connected Tripwire.

data.name: IDS_DESC_TRIPWIRE
data.value: Activates a connected Tripwire Hook when an entity passes through it.

data.name: IDS_DESC_EMERALDBLOCK
data.value: A compact way of storing Emeralds.

data.name: IDS_DESC_ANVIL
data.value: Can be used to repair weapons, tools and armor.

data.name: IDS_DESC_NETHER_QUARTZ_ORE
data.value: Smelted in a furnace to produce Nether Quartz.

data.name: IDS_DESC_FLOWERPOT
data.value: Used as a decoration. Flowers, Saplings, Cacti and Mushrooms can be planted in it.

data.name: IDS_DESC_CARROTS
data.value: Restores 2{*ICON_SHANK_01*}, and can be crafted into a golden carrot. Can be planted in farmland.

data.name: IDS_DESC_POTATO
data.value: Restores 0.5{*ICON_SHANK_01*}, or can be cooked in a furnace. This can be planted in farmland.

data.name: IDS_DESC_POTATO_BAKED
data.value: Restores 3{*ICON_SHANK_01*}. Created by cooking a potato in a furnace.

data.name: IDS_DESC_POTATO_POISONOUS
data.value: Restores 1{*ICON_SHANK_01*}. Eating this can cause you to become poisoned.

data.name: IDS_DESC_CARROT_GOLDEN
data.value: Restores 3{*ICON_SHANK_01*}. Crafted from a carrot and gold nuggets.

data.name: IDS_DESC_CARROT_ON_A_STICK
data.value: Used to control a saddled pig when riding on it.

data.name: IDS_DESC_ENCHANTED_BOOK
data.value: Used with an Anvil to enchant weapons, tools or armor.

data.name: IDS_DESC_NETHER_QUARTZ
data.value: Created by mining Nether Quartz Ore. Can be crafted into a Block of Quartz.

data.name: IDS_DESC_CARPET
data.value: Crafted from Wool. Used as a decoration.

data.name: IDS_DEATH_FALLING_ANVIL
data.value: {*PLAYER*} was squashed by a falling Anvil.

data.name: IDS_DEATH_FALLING_TILE
data.value: {*PLAYER*} was squashed by a falling block.

data.name: IDS_POTION_DESC_NIGHTVISION
data.value: Makes dark areas appear as if in daylight, even under water.

data.name: IDS_POTION_DESC_INVISIBILITY
data.value: Makes affected players, animals and monsters invisible.

data.name: IDS_TUTORIAL_TASK_ANVIL_MENU_OVERVIEW
data.value: This is the Anvil interface, which you can use to rename, repair and apply enchantments to weapons, armor, or tools, at the cost of Experience Levels.

data.name: IDS_TUTORIAL_PROMPT_ANVIL_MENU_OVERVIEW
IDS_TUTORIAL_TASK_ANVIL_MENU_START
data.value: To begin working on an item, place it in the first input slot.

data.name: IDS_TUTORIAL_TASK_ANVIL_MENU_REPAIR
data.value: When the correct raw material is placed in the second input slot (e.g. Iron Ingots for a damaged Iron Sword), the proposed repair appears in the output slot.

data.name: IDS_TUTORIAL_TASK_ANVIL_MENU_SACRIFICE
data.value: Alternatively, a second identical item can be placed into the second slot to combine the two items.

data.name: IDS_TUTORIAL_TASK_ANVIL_MENU_ENCHANT
data.value: To enchant items on the Anvil, place an Enchanted Book in the second input slot.

data.name: IDS_TUTORIAL_TASK_ANVIL_MENU_COST
data.value: The number of Experience Levels that the work will cost is shown beneath the output. If you do not have enough Experience Levels, the repair cannot be completed.

data.name: IDS_TUTORIAL_TASK_ANVIL_MENU_RENAMING
data.value: It is possible to rename the item by editing the name shown in the textbox.

data.name: IDS_TUTORIAL_TASK_ANVIL_MENU_SMITH
data.value: Picking up the repaired item will consume both items used by the Anvil and decrease your Experience Level by the given amount.

data.name: IDS_TUTORIAL_TASK_ANVIL_OVERVIEW
data.value: In this area there is an Anvil and a Chest containing tools and weapons to work on.

data.name: IDS_TUTORIAL_PROMPT_ANVIL_OVERVIEW
IDS_TUTORIAL_TASK_ANVIL_SUMMARY
data.value: Using an Anvil, weapons and tools can be repaired to restore their durability, renamed, or enchanted with Enchanted Books.

data.name: IDS_TUTORIAL_TASK_ANVIL_ENCHANTED_BOOKS
data.value: Enchanted Books can be found inside Chests within dungeons, or enchanted from normal Books at the Enchantment Table.

data.name: IDS_TUTORIAL_TASK_ANVIL_COST
data.value: Using the Anvil costs Experience Levels, and each use has a chance to damage the Anvil.

data.name: IDS_TUTORIAL_TASK_ANVIL_COST2
data.value: The type of work to be done, value of the item, number of enchantments, and amount of prior work all affect the cost of repair.

data.name: IDS_TUTORIAL_TASK_ANVIL_RENAMING
data.value: Renaming an item changes the displayed name for all players and permanently reduces the prior work cost.

data.name: IDS_TUTORIAL_TASK_ANVIL_USE_CHESTS
data.value: In the Chest in this area you will find damaged Pickaxes, raw materials, Bottles O' Enchanting, and Enchanted Books to experiment with.

data.name: IDS_TUTORIAL_TASK_TRADING_MENU_OVERVIEW
data.value: This is the trading interface which displays trades that can be made with a villager.

data.name: IDS_TUTORIAL_PROMPT_TRADING_MENU_OVERVIEW
IDS_TUTORIAL_TASK_TRADING_MENU_START
data.value: All trades that the villager is willing to make at the moment are displayed along the top.

data.name: IDS_TUTORIAL_TASK_TRADING_MENU_UNAVAILABLE
data.value: Trades will appear red and be unavailable if you do not have the required items.

data.name: IDS_TUTORIAL_TASK_TRADING_MENU_DETAILS
data.value: The amount and type of items you are giving to the villager are shown in the two boxes on the left.

data.name: IDS_TUTORIAL_TASK_TRADING_MENU_INVENTORY
data.value: You can see the total number of the items required for the trade in the two boxes on the left.

data.name: IDS_TUTORIAL_TASK_TRADING_MENU_TRADE
data.value: Press{*CONTROLLER_VK_A*} to trade the items the villager requires for the item on offer.

data.name: IDS_TUTORIAL_TASK_TRADING_OVERVIEW
data.value: In this area there is a villager and a Chest containing Paper to purchase items.

data.name: IDS_TUTORIAL_PROMPT_TRADING_OVERVIEW
IDS_TUTORIAL_TASK_TRADING_SUMMARY
data.value: Players can trade items from their inventory with villagers.

data.name: IDS_TUTORIAL_TASK_TRADING_TRADES
data.value: The trades a villager is likely to offer depends on their profession.

data.name: IDS_TUTORIAL_TASK_TRADING_INCREASE_TRADES
data.value: Performing a mix of trades will randomly add to or update the villager's available trades.

data.name: IDS_TUTORIAL_TASK_TRADING_DECREASE_TRADES
data.value: Trades that have been used frequently may be removed temporarily, but the villager will always offer at least one trade.

data.name: IDS_TUTORIAL_TASK_TRADING_USE_CHESTS
data.value: Take some Paper from the Chest and try trading with the villager here.

data.name: IDS_TUTORIAL_TASK_ENDERCHEST_OVERVIEW
data.value: In this area there are two Ender Chests.

data.name: IDS_TUTORIAL_PROMPT_ENDERCHEST_OVERVIEW
IDS_TUTORIAL_TASK_ENDERCHEST_SUMMARY
data.value: All Ender Chests in a world are linked, even across dimensions. Items placed into an Ender Chest are accessible in any other Ender Chest.

data.name: IDS_TUTORIAL_TASK_ENDERCHEST_PLAYERS
data.value: However, the contents of the Ender Chests are different for each player.

data.name: IDS_TUTORIAL_TASK_ENDERCHEST_FUNCTION
data.value: This allows players to store items in any Ender Chest, and retrieve them from other Ender Chests in different positions in the world. You can try this now by placing items in either Ender Chest.

data.name: IDS_DESC_ENCHANTED_GOLDENAPPLE
data.value: Restores 2{*ICON_SHANK_01*}, regenerates health for 30 seconds, and grants fire resistance and damage resistance for 5 minutes. Crafted from an apple and gold blocks.

data.name: IDS_PRIV_CAN_INVISIBLE_TOGGLE_OFF
data.value: You can no longer enable invisibility

data.name: IDS_PRIV_CAN_FLY_TOGGLE_OFF
data.value: You can no longer enable flying

data.name: IDS_PRIV_CAN_EXHAUSTION_TOGGLE_OFF
data.value: You can no longer disable exhaustion

data.name: IDS_HOW_TO_PLAY_ANVIL
IDS_HOW_TO_PLAY_TRADING
IDS_HOW_TO_PLAY_ENDERCHEST
data.value: {*T3*}HOW TO PLAY : ENDER CHEST {*ETW*}{*B*}{*B*} All Ender Chests in a world are linked. Items placed into an Ender Chest are accessible in any other. However, the contents of the Ender Chests are different for each player. This allows players to store items in any Ender Chest, and retrieve them from other Ender Chests in different positions in the world.

data.name: IDS_DESC_VILLAGER
data.value: Found in villages, villagers will offer to sell items to the player depending on their profession.

data.name: IDS_TUTORIAL_TASK_ENCHANTING_BOOKS
data.value: You can also create Enchanted Books at the Enchantment Table, which can be used later at the Anvil to apply their enchantment to an item.

data.name: IDS_TUTORIAL_TASK_REDSTONE_TRIPWIRE
data.value: Tripwire Hooks will also provide constant power to a circuit while something is triggering the string between them.

data.name: IDS_TUTORIAL_TASK_BREEDING_WOLF_COLLAR
data.value: Once tamed, a wolf will always have its collar on. The color of their collar can be changed by dying it.

data.name: IDS_TUTORIAL_TASK_FARMING_CARROTS_AND_POTATOES
data.value: Carrots and Potatoes are farmed by planting Carrots or Potatoes, and are ready for harvesting when the vegetable is visible above the ground.

data.name: IDS_TUTORIAL_TASK_BREEDING_RIDING_PIGS
data.value: Additionally, pigs can be saddled and then ridden by players. They are controlled by tempting them with a Carrot on a Stick.

data.name: IDS_TUTORIAL_TASK_MINECART_PUSHING
data.value: If necessary you can slowly move your minecart along using {*CONTROLLER_ACTION_MOVE*}. This helps to start the minecart by getting it onto a powered rail.

data.name: IDS_CONNECTION_FAILED_NO_SD_SPLITSCREEN
data.value: You cannot join this game as split-screen is only supported when in High Definition mode. Sign out all other players if you wish to join.
